task_completion.description: Configure the shoulder motor maxVelocity to 2.094 rad/s.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Webots Scene Tree (usually on the left) or a text editor showing the 'shoulder_motor' node. The 'maxVelocity' field must be set to 2.094.

task_completion.description: Configure the elbow motor maxVelocity to 3.14 rad/s.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'elbow_motor' node in the Webots Scene Tree or text editor. The 'maxVelocity' field must be set to 3.14.

task_completion.description: Configure the elbow motor maxTorque to 56.0 N·m.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'elbow_motor' node in the Webots Scene Tree or text editor. The 'maxTorque' field must be set to 56.0.

task_completion.description: Configure the wrist motor minPosition to -6.28 rad and maxPosition to 6.28 rad.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'wrist_motor' node in the Webots Scene Tree or text editor. The 'minPosition' field must be set to -6.28 and the 'maxPosition' field must be set to 6.28.

Look for a 'Save World As...' dialog box in Webots targeting '/home/ga/Desktop/palletizing_arm_configured.wbt', a terminal command saving the file to this path, or the file 'palletizing_arm_configured.wbt' visible on the Desktop.

integrity.description: The agent actually interacted with the Webots application or a legitimate text editor to modify the world file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Webots GUI being navigated (e.g., expanding the scene tree) or a text editor (like VS Code, nano, or gedit) open with the .wbt file contents, rather than just a terminal echoing text.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a pre-written script to bypass manual configuration.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no terminal commands executing a python or bash script that magically generates the final .wbt file without the agent manually editing the values.

integrity.description: The agent saved the file to the exact requested path without overwriting the original system files improperly.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check the 'Save As' dialog or terminal commands to ensure the path is exactly '/home/ga/Desktop/palletizing_arm_configured.wbt'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Output Path: /home/ga/Desktop/palletizing_arm_configured.wbt. Expected Parameters: shoulder_motor maxVelocity = 2.094; elbow_motor maxVelocity = 3.14, maxTorque = 56.0; wrist_motor minPosition = -6.28, maxPosition = 6.28.
